programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken is horrified to discover Denise has spent the night in hospital after losing blood. Deirdre is embarrassed by Curly's patronising interview technique(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des puts his For Sale sign back up, Denise is distraught over the baby, Vera is stunned when Geoff sacks Lester, and Maureen refuses to let Reg out of the shop(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: A funeral attracts some unwanted media attention, Nick's fight for Alice demands that Zoe reveals her secret, and Michael confronts Pollard(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Rachel's discovery alerts police, but the suspect seems to have disappeared. Turner drowns his sorrows, while the shocking truth about the reality of the siege is revealed(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Helen is accused of helping an elderly, terminally ill patient to die, a problem compounded by the strain of concealing her relationship with Rob. Meanwhile, Peggy and David go into business selling stolen strawberries - unaware that Geoff Younger is hot on their trail. Rural drama, with Sophie Ward, Jonathan Kerrigan, Gwen Taylor, David Lonsdale and Steven Blakeley(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George's brother discovers documents that prove Mildred married an Army deserter. Comedy, starring Yootha Joyce and Brian Murphy(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George buys a pair of homing pigeons with which to annoy his next door neighbours, after Mildred accidentally flushes his beloved goldfish down the sink. Brian Murphy stars(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: The trio move out to allow workmen into the flat, and Robin is more than happy to share a bed - until he finds out who with. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The investigation of a burglary at a quarry turns into something far more serious when a security guard's badly beaten body is discovered at the scene of the crime. An autistic teenager is arrested for the murder, despite Inspector Frost's misgivings - a move which triggers a chain of tragic events culminating in a tense stand-off. Crime drama, starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, Caroline Harker and Maurice Roeves(n)

programme.desc: Vera tries to secure Rita and Sally's silence over what they saw in Blackpool. Reg starts work at Firman's Freezers. Fiona is fed up that there is no work at the salon(n)

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Larry's latest novel is being published in England - but his siblings do not seem to be very impressed, his mother is more concerned with baking food to sell at the market, and even his attempts to show off in a local bar go unnoticed. Louisa attempts to make it up to him by organising a public reading. Leslie overhears Pavlos explaining to Margo how he makes liquor out of kumquats, and decides to launch a business venture brewing his own - but his sister does not approve of stealing the monk's recipe(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The folk of Aidensfield panic when rumours of an escaped killer are confirmed. programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: As Foyle and his team search for a missing boy, their investigation leads them to a less than inviting hotel - and the discovery of the youngster's body in the nearby woods suggests one of the residents could be responsible. Milner finds his loyalty divided when Foyle is placed under house arrest, but the determined investigator vows to prove his innocence. Drama series, starring Michael Kitchen(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is reunited with sidekick Captain Hastings (Hugh Fraser), secretary Miss Lemon (Pauline Moran) and Inspector Japp (Philip Jackson) in a case that plunges him into the world of global espionage as the Second World War looms. The public are in panic after the shocking death of Russian grandmaster Ivan Savaranoff during a game of chess. Poirot must try to determine the good guys from the bad in a complex plot that sees the main figures used like pawns. David Suchet stars in a story adapted by Mark Gatiss and Ian Hallard(n)

programme.title: The Bay
programme.desc: Main suspect Nick goes missing, and Lisa is concerned about Sean's possible involvement in the disappearance. The discovery of a key piece of evidence provokes a number of new theories, and the police begin to look more closely at other members of the Meredith family. Elsewhere, Abbie falls deeper into Vincent's world, bringing Sam with her, while Sean's vigilante justice leads him down a dangerous path. Drama, starring Morven Christie, Jonas Armstrong, Tracie Bennett, Lindsey Coulson and Chanel Cresswell(n)

programme.desc: Alice's future is in the balance as Nick takes to the stand in court, while Vic discovers that Reg has left a dilemma for the family. Luke and Biff fish for evidence against Eric(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Deirdre is thrilled to receive a passionate letter from Samir, while Liz advises her not to let a holiday romance ruin her life. Alf shows Maureen the ropes at the Cash and Carry(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Deirdre wants to see Samir, but has no money to send him for a ticket, so she asks Mike for a loan. Des is amazed when Sean offers him a job(n)

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Larry moves back into the family's villa having come down with mumps, which Louisa hopes will give Aunt Hermione an incentive to cancel her planned visit. Her hopes prove in vain when her overbearing relative turns up, accompanied by medium Mrs Haddock (Una Stubbs), who claims to be able to contact Louisa's husband. She tells Louisa that he is terribly unhappy about her numerous male admirers, fuelling her doubts over her relationship with Hugh, and proposes a seance on a stormy night to set his troubled spirit at rest(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Walker investigates when sibling rivalry and greed result in a fatal car crash. A devout couple are faced with money problems when their baby is diagnosed with a life-threatening condition. Meanwhile, Peggy is up to her usual tricks as she frightens some holiday-makers, and Jack and Gina get a scare of their own during a walk on the moors. Rural drama, starring Gwen Taylor, Murray Head and Tricia Penrose(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle responds to complaints of sabotage at an RAF burns hospital and uncovers adultery and murder within the medical unit. As the hunt for the guilty party intensifies, the detective discovers his son Andrew could be a suspect and is shocked when he hears he has been reported missing from his barracks. Wartime crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, John Wood, Honeysuckle Weeks and Julian Ovenden(n)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The irascible medic decides to move out of the surgery to give Louisa space, leaving Mrs Tishell concerned he will not be able to look after himself on his own. Elsewhere, PC Penhale helps Janice babysit, and Al is very concerned when he finds out about Bert's behaviour and hears there are bailiffs at the restaurant(n)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa and Martin have their first therapy session together - though neither of them was expecting they would be given homework - while Morwenna is not happy about it when a teenager on work experience starts trying to boss her around in the surgery. Mrs Tishell is surprised when her husband Clive returns and tells her he wants to give things another go, and Louisa has to call Martin when one of her pupils collapses during a school excursion. Comedy drama, starring Martin Clunes and Caroline Catz(n)

programme.title: The Bay
programme.desc: A confession to Lisa shines a possible new light on Dylan's killer. Meanwhile, Abbie has a terrifying experience with some local addicts, and Rob's escalating actions begin to impact on his family. Elsewhere, Med starts to suspect Lisa is hiding something from him and begins to make his own investigations. Six-part crime drama following the work of Detective Sergeant Lisa Armstrong as she is assigned to a missing persons investigation. Starring Morven Christie, Jonas Armstrong, Tracie Bennett and Lindsey Coulson(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A solicitor enlists Holmes to help clear him of murdering eccentric builder Jonas Oldacre, whose considerable personal fortune he stood to inherit. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett as the famed Victorian detective(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur swaps the contents of his lock-up for a slot-machine full of stolen money during a trip to the fair. Unfortunately the incriminating item is passed to Morley, who uses it at a charity event, and a showdown between cops and robbers ensues. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole, Nicholas Day and Gary Webster(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle is given a deadly new rifle for testing, but the weapon is promptly stolen. To make matters worse, he discovers he is being stalked by an old friend who has embarked on a vendetta. Vicki Michelle ('Allo 'Allo!) makes an early screen appearance, alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan gets caught in the crossfire between the family of a recently deceased gangland leader and the members of the late man's crime syndicate, regarding the division of the hoodlum's wealth. The hitherto innocent son manages to play-off his parent's ex-cohorts against one another with increasing dexterity and appears only too keen to pick up the duplicitous traits of his late father. Hywel Bennett guest stars, with John Thaw(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Sam and Quincy are sent to a Caribbean island, where an American-manufactured anti-diphtheria drug has apparently begun claiming the lives of the people it is supposed to protect(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo discovers that a series of car thefts are part of a scam, with victims allowing their cars to be stolen so they can claim insurance. Guest starring David Ogden Stiers (MASH)(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A doctor visits Holmes on behalf of his friend and sponsor Blessington, a nervous invalid whose fragile peace of mind has been thrown into turmoil by a series of mysterious events. Drama, guest starring Patrick Newell and Nicholas Clay, with Jeremy Brett and David Burke(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A face from the past spreads stories that cause Arthur and Dave to fall out, and the camel-coated entrepreneur opens a rival establishment to the Winchester Club. However, Ray harbours doubts concerning the instigator's honesty. George Cole, Gary Webster and Glynn Edwards star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The brother of a suspected drug-dealer dies while in custody, and his elder sibling directs his powerful lawyer to instigate a committee to investigate CI5's involvement. With the future of the division in question, Bodie and Doyle try to prove the family's drug-trade connection and the real reason behind the man's death. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan encounters a former nemesis at a party, who drunkenly admits involvement in an earlier robbery in which he was let go due to lack of evidence. He disapproves of his daughter's villainous boyfriend, and Regan suspects he is being exploited to help break the romantic union. However, an even darker plan is being hatched, with the daughter an innocent pawn in a robbery. Kenny Lynch and Derek Francis guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Todd Carty, Jo Pavey, Saira Khan and Dominic Holland pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove buy and transform a BSA Bantam from a humble roadster into a trial bike. However, they soon discover it is far easier to restore than it is to sell(n)

programme.title: Billy Connolly's Great American Trail
programme.desc: The comedian embarks on a journey across the US, following the migratory trail of the Scots through America - starting in New York and finishing in Nashville, Tennessee. The first episode sees Billy open the New York Tartan Day parade in front of a 30,000-strong crowd. He then heads to Plymouth, Massachusetts, where the pilgrims first landed on American soil, followed by a meeting with the Native American tribe who almost had their people and language wiped out(n)

programme.title: The Nice Guys (2016)
programme.desc: A private detective investigates the murder of a porn star in 1970s Los Angeles, only to run into a hired thug employed to scare him off. However, the mysterious disappearance of a woman connected to the case forces the unlikely duo to work together, leading them to uncover a government conspiracy. Crime comedy, starring Russell Crowe and Ryan Gosling(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Sam and Quincy are sent to a Caribbean island, where an American-manufactured anti-diphtheria drug has apparently begun claiming the lives of the people it is supposed to protect(n)

programme.title: Kojak

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A doctor visits Holmes on behalf of his friend and sponsor Blessington, a nervous invalid whose fragile peace of mind has been thrown into turmoil by a series of mysterious events. Drama, guest starring Patrick Newell and Nicholas Clay, with Jeremy Brett and David Burke(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A face from the past spreads stories that cause Arthur and Dave to fall out, and the camel-coated entrepreneur opens a rival establishment to the Winchester Club. However, Ray harbours doubts concerning the instigator's honesty. George Cole, Gary Webster and Glynn Edwards star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The brother of a suspected drug-dealer dies while in custody, and his elder sibling directs his powerful lawyer to instigate a committee to investigate CI5's involvement. With the future of the division in question, Bodie and Doyle try to prove the family's drug-trade connection and the real reason behind the man's death. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan encounters a former nemesis at a party, who drunkenly admits involvement in an earlier robbery in which he was let go due to lack of evidence. He disapproves of his daughter's villainous boyfriend, and Regan suspects he is being exploited to help break the romantic union. However, an even darker plan is being hatched, with the daughter an innocent pawn in a robbery. Kenny Lynch and Derek Francis guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Storm Imogen causes chaos on the runways and in the terminals, with airside safety officer Simon keeping his eyes peeled for any potentially dangerous debris that could damage the landing planes. In Terminal 4, manager Sunita looks after dozens of passengers whose flight to Delhi has been cancelled, while trainee engineer Elliot prepares to get his hands dirty as he clears a blocked sewage pit - an essential part of the airport's operations that no passenger normally sees(n)

programme.title: Rocky Balboa (2006)
programme.desc: The ageing fighter contemplates a return to the ring when a computer simulation reveals he would have defeated the current world heavyweight champion Mason 'The Line' Dixon, who responds by challenging Rocky to face him for real. programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: An evangelist's death troubles Quincy, prompting him to break with procedure and attempt a 'psychological autopsy' in a bid to determine the truth. Jack Klugman stars(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo investigates a murder that may have been committed by a fellow Greek-American, which stirs up resentment in the community. Guest starring Oskar Homolka (The Seven Year Itch)(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Moriarty seeks revenge on Holmes for foiling his plan to sell the Mona Lisa, and the pair ultimately fight their final battle at the Reichenbach Falls in Switzerland. Jeremy Brett stars as the titular hero, with David Burke making his final appearance as Dr Watson and Eric Porter as Moriarty(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur purchases a consignment of satellite dishes, enlisting the aid of a former television repair man to fit them. However, his contractor proves to be afraid of heights. Meanwhile, Ray develops an interest in the daughter of volatile Italian businessman 'Fingers' Rosetti. Pete Postlethwaite guest stars, with George Cole and Gary Webster(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's girlfriend is critically injured in a restaurant bomb blast, prompting him to seek revenge. When it transpires the intended target was an apparently unimportant accountant, Bodie ignores Cowley's orders and begins probing the man's past. Lewis Collins stars(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A crook arranges the conversion of replica firearms into the real thing and sells them on to small-time hoodlums. When one of the arms misfires killing both a policeman and its holder, Regan is intent on discovering the source before more innocent lives are lost. Crime drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Phil Daniels, Janette Manrara, Isabel Hodgins and Roy Hudd pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: A bloody attack on a young swimmer points to something dangerous in a remote stretch of the Parana River in Argentina. Jeremy Wade discovers locals are blaming a creature they call the River Tiger - a muscular predator with jaws like a bolt cutter - but to back up their stories, the freshwater detective needs to catch a specimen big enough to inflict the chilling wounds he has heard about(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Beyond the Amazon, in the remote jungles of Guyana, fishermen are disappearing without trace. Locals blame the 'water mama', a mermaid that is said to drag victims to their death. Could the largely unexplored rivers of this region be hiding a new monster, or is there a more familiar predator lurking beneath the surface? When an eyewitness claims to have seen the creature in a lake, Jeremy Wade's hunt for this mysterious bodysnatcher takes an unexpected turn, bringing him face to face with an astonishing beast(n)

programme.title: The Untouchables (1987)
programme.desc: Incorruptible federal agent Eliot Ness is assigned the task of fighting organised crime in Prohibition-era Chicago and bringing the notorious crime boss Al Capone to justice. Aware crooked police are undermining his investigations, he puts together his own elite squad to take on the Mob. Brian De Palma's crime thriller, with Kevin Costner, Robert De Niro, Andy Garcia and Sean Connery, who won an Oscar for his performance(n)

programme.desc: Arthur swaps the contents of his lock-up for a slot-machine full of stolen money during a trip to the fair. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole, Nicholas Day and Gary Webster(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan gets caught in the crossfire between the family of a recently deceased gangland leader and the members of the late man's crime syndicate, regarding the division of the hoodlum's wealth. Hywel Bennett guest stars, with John Thaw(n)

programme.title: Billy Connolly's Great American Trail
programme.desc: The comedian embarks on a journey across the US, following the migratory trail of the Scots through America - starting in New York and finishing in Nashville, Tennessee. The first episode sees Billy open the New York Tartan Day parade in front of a 30,000-strong crowd. He then heads to Plymouth, Massachusetts, where the pilgrims first landed on American soil, followed by a meeting with the Native American tribe who almost had their people and language wiped out(n)

programme.title: The Nice Guys (2016)

Crime comedy, starring Russell Crowe and Ryan Gosling(n)

programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: The comedian traverses the North Coast 500, a 500-mile trip around the northernmost parts of mainland Britain. Beginning in the village of Golspie, Susan travels round the coast to Dunrobin Castle. There, she sees the 189-room property's clock tower inspired by Big Ben, as well as its very own private train station. Further up the coast, Susan visits the Whaligoe steps, stunningly carved into the dramatic landscape, before getting a taste of the work of a real-life 'herring girl'. programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: Engineer Rob Bell offers an insight into the history, design and building process of the Britannia Bridge, across the Menai Strait between the island of Anglesey and the mainland of Wales. The difficult task of building the 100ft iron structure was taken up by civil engineer Robert Stephenson and his team, including William Fairbairn and Eaton Hodgkinson. But in May 1970, four youths set light to the famous bridge, and Rob meets a fireman who fought the blaze that fateful night(n)

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow charts the life of Greek artist Domenicos Theotocopolous, dubbed El Greco, one of the most distinctive painters of the 16th century. His work was considered to be ahead of its time - so much so that it was all but ignored for 300 years. El Greco developed a highly individualistic style that eventually proved enormously influential, paving the way for the Baroque and providing the inspiration for 20th-century expressionism(n)

But unaware to the couple the host has recently gone vegan, so it turns out to be a meat-free knees-up. Kim and Matt reopen their chip shop after a devastating fire which forced them to shut for a year and Harrison is down on the marina, trying to sell tickets for the Black Pearl pirate ship tour(n)

Along the way there are tips on getting the best sunbed, tackling drinking during the day and different ideas for lunchtimes. Plus, how do the kitchen staff pull off a last-minute menu change for 1,000 guests?(n)

programme.desc: Only the world's richest can possibly afford a super yacht, but it is not the price tag that makes these extravagant vessels exceptional, it is the luxurious details. Here, members of the billionaire Haidar family display their 52-metre floating palace, where a 13-strong staff attends to their every need. Plus, cameras sneak a peek behind the scenes as a charter yacht is prepared for a group of wealthy Americans and follow Becki Milton, private yacht shopper to the super-rich, as she finds the ultimate getaway for three secretive celebs(n)

programme.title: Busted in Bangkok
programme.desc: Documentary following Thailand's tourist police, focusing on four of the country's holiday hotspots as officers and volunteers ensure the good times do not get out of hand. A drunken Brit has a bone to pick over a restaurant bill. But clashing with security guards isn't the wisest of moves, and soon the law enforcers are called in to keep the peace. In Pattaya, volunteer Freddie finds a holiday-maker covered in blood. Unfortunately, his attempts to help spark an unexpected reaction(n)

programme.title: Traffic Cops

On the outskirts of Derby, a high-speed pursuit of a suspected drug runner takes a dangerous turn off-road for Ant and Nick. And when suspected drug runners pull up outside an address, the officers, believing they are about to make a delivery, are quick to detain a young male and female(n)

programme.desc: Tim Marlow explores the life and work of 17th-century artist Peter Paul Rubens, who enjoyed an active and eventful career. He was regarded as the chief exponent of the Baroque style, merging the grace of the Italian High Renaissance with the realism and landscapes of the northern tradition, and was perhaps best known for painting voluptuous female nudes within large-scale mythological allegories(n)

programme.title: Humpback Whale: Birth of a Giant
programme.desc: In crystal clear waters off the Pacific coast of Colombia, a newborn humpback whale draws its first breath. The mammal is already 16 feet long, but the challenges ahead are even more giant. This unique standalone film follows the first few months as the whale prepares for one of longest animal migrations on Earth - a 5,000-mile journey south to the freezing waters of Antarctica, where food is plentiful(n)

programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: Susan explores the city of Glasgow, and in its oldest building, Glasgow Cathedral, she discovers a seat fit for only a Queen. The comedian learns how centuries of craftsmen left their mark on the building. Donning her hard hat and climbing to the top, she is also given the opportunity to leave her own. Then it's onto the home of Scottish football to meet the only Scot ever to have won a football world cup, before taking on the pros to score a goal herself at Hampden Park(n)

programme.title: Holidaying with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Jane heads to New York and stays in the heart of Manhattan - Times Square. She has a caricature done in Central Park, enjoys a personal shopping experience, and has a helicopter ride over the city. Joining her to explore is former Olympic athlete Greg Rutherford, along with his wife Susie and two children. They stay in a 5-Star hotel on the shores of Lake Annecy in the French Alps. Plus, Angellica Bell enjoys a staycation weekend in Devon, residing in a quirky beach hut in Babbacombe Bay(n)

programme.title: Inside the World's Greatest Hotels
programme.desc: A look at the Balmoral hotel, a 10-storey Gothic pile, rising up across the Edinburgh skyline as a much-cherished landmark. Currently celebrating 117 years of welcoming guests through its doors, this symbol of wealth and power from a bygone era has played host to everyone from royalty to the mega-stars of the stage and screen. This documentary includes a behind-the-scenes peek of its famous clock tower and reveals why JK Rowling felt the hotel was just the ticket when she needed to finish the final instalment of her world-renowned Harry Potter series(n)

programme.title: Notting Hill (1999)
programme.desc: A recently divorced bookshop owner finds love with a glamorous Hollywood film star, but ends up the focus of unwanted media interest - which makes maintaining a relationship a tricky proposition. Romantic comedy written by Richard Curtis, starring Hugh Grant, Julia Roberts, Rhys Ifans, Emma Chambers, James Dreyfus and Gina McKee(n)

programme.title: Hondo (1953)
programme.desc: A hard-boiled cavalry scout with a feral dog as companion stumbles across a woman and her child stranded on their homestead deep inside hostile territory. Despite repeated attacks by the Apaches, they refuse to leave their home, leaving the scout with no choice but to stay and defend her. Western, starring John Wayne, Geraldine Page, Ward Bond and Michael Pate(n)

programme.title: Heaven Knows, Mr Allison (1957)
programme.desc: A US marine corporal stationed on a South Pacific island and a novice nun on a mission are forced into the hills when Japanese forces arrive and set up military bases during the Second World War. Before long the pair develop strong emotional ties, but in resisting their feelings for each other the relationship becomes one of deep mutual respect. Romantic drama, written and directed by John Huston, with Robert Mitchum and Deborah Kerr(n)

programme.title: Freedom Radio (1940)
programme.desc: A Viennese doctor tries to maintain business as usual while living under Nazi rule. However, events take a sickening turn when his wife begins wholeheartedly espousing Hitler's views - prompting him to start broadcasting Allied propaganda from a secret transmitter. Second World War drama, starring Clive Brook, Diana Wynyard, Raymond Huntley and Derek Farr(n)

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri (1954)
programme.desc: An American naval reserve pilot is called up for service in the Korean War, and must leave his family and civilian job as a lawyer. In command of a corps of naval pilots, he heads a bombing campaign on strategic Communist positions, but later comes to question the morality of the conflict. Adventure, starring William Holden, Grace Kelly, Fredric March and Mickey Rooney(n)

programme.title: Super 8 (2011)
programme.desc: A boy and his friends sneak out at night to film an amateur zombie movie, only to witness a train derailment. As people start disappearing from their town and the military descends in force, they come to realise a dangerous alien was being transported on the train and is now on the loose. Sci-fi thriller, starring Joel Courtney and Elle Fanning(n)

programme.title: Get Out (2017)
programme.desc: After African American photographer Chris and his white girlfriend Rose visit her wealthy parents, he suspects there's more to the locals than meets the eye. Oscar-winning psychological thriller written and directed by Jordan Peele (Us), starring Daniel Kaluuya, Allison Williams, Bradley Whitford and Caleb Landry Jones(n)

programme.title: Cell (2016)
programme.desc: A mysterious signal is transmitted to every mobile phone in the world, causing those who hear it to turn into bloodthirsty maniacs. A writer who was unaffected by the transmission bands together with a few other survivors to track down his family and unlock the mystery behind the crisis. Sci-fi thriller based on Stephen King's novel, starring John Cusack and Samuel L Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Anomaly (2014)
programme.desc: A traumatised former soldier wakes up in a strange place with no memory of how he got there, and immediately finds his life is in danger. As he goes on the run, he finds more sections of his memory being erased and discovers a sinister conspiracy. Sci-fi thriller, directed by and starring Noel Clarke, with Ian Somerhalder and Brian Cox(n)

programme.title: Comanche Station (1960)
programme.desc: A cowboy recruits a trio of outlaws to rescue a woman held captive at a Comanche camp and reunite her with her husband in return for a large reward. However, his partners decide the bounty should be split three ways rather than four and plan to double-cross him. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Nancy Gates, Claude Akins and Skip Homeier(n)

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Secret Weapon (1942)
programme.desc: The sleuth and his indefatigable sidekick Watson are employed by the British government to smuggle the mastermind behind an experimental weapon out of Switzerland before he falls into the hands of the Nazis. When the scientist disappears, Holmes faces a showdown with an old enemy. Mystery thriller, starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce(n)

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: Terror By Night (1946)
programme.desc: The sleuth and his faithful sidekick Dr Watson hunt for the killer of an aristocrat who hired them to keep a priceless diamond out of the hands of thieves. Mystery, starring Basil Rathbone, Nigel Bruce, Alan Mowbray, Dennis Hoey and Mary Forbes(n)

programme.title: Thunder Over Arizona (1956)
programme.desc: An honest cowboy is mistaken for the notorious outlaw he killed in self-defence. Before he can clear up the misunderstanding, he is approached by a corrupt mayor who draws him into a conspiracy to wrest control of a silver mine from its rightful owners. Western, starring Skip Homeier, Kristine Miller, George Macready and Wallace Ford(n)

programme.title: Tiger Bay (1959)
programme.desc: A Polish sailor flees Cardiff's docklands after murdering his girlfriend in a jealous rage, initially unaware that a 12-year-old tomboy has witnessed the crime and has taken his abandoned gun to show off to her friends. However, he comes back to abduct the girl in a bid to keep her quiet - but the pair form a friendship and she tries to help him escape the police. Thriller, starring Hayley Mills in her film debut alongside her father John, with Horst Buchholz(n)

programme.title: Men in Black 3 (2012)
programme.desc: An alien criminal escapes from a prison on the moon and goes back in time on a mission of revenge, changing the course of history. Agent J of the top-secret Earth defence organisation follows him back to 1969, and joins forces with a younger version of his mentor Agent K to set things right. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Will Smith, Josh Brolin and Tommy Lee Jones(n)

programme.title: Split (2016)
programme.desc: After being abducted by a kidnapper with multiple personalities, three young women are soon engaged in a fight for survival. Meanwhile, an oblivious psychiatrist tries to ease her patient's fractured mind as a 24th character with apparent superhuman abilities attempts to dominate his body. M Night Shyamalan's thriller, starring James McAvoy, Anya Taylor-Joy and Betty Buckley(n)

programme.title: Dead Man's Shoes (2004)
programme.desc: A man returns to his Derbyshire home town and it soon becomes clear he has a dark purpose for revisiting his old stamping ground, and the local drug dealers have plenty of reason to be nervous. Psychological thriller from director Shane Meadows, starring Paddy Considine, Toby Kebbell, Gary Stretch and Stuart Wolfenden(n)

programme.title: The Master (2012)
programme.desc: After leaving the navy, a tormented Second World War veteran with a fierce temper develops an intense relationship with a man starting his own religion. However, the former serviceman's darker impulses remain hard to control, especially when confronted with evidence of the cult leader's dishonesty. Paul Thomas Anderson's drama, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Philip Seymour Hoffman and Amy Adams(n)

programme.title: Night Passage (1957)

Western, starring James Stewart, Audie Murphy, Dan Duryea and Brandon de Wilde(n)

programme.title: Decision at Sundown (1957)
programme.desc: A gunslinger rides into a backwoods town intent on finding his dead wife's former lover and exacting revenge for her death. The man he blames now has total control of the town and has the sheriff at his beck and call. Undeterred, the drifter offers his enemy an ultimatum - he has until sundown to leave the town or face retribution for his crimes. Western, with Randolph Scott, John Carroll and Andrew Duggan(n)

programme.title: Strategic Air Command (1955)

Drama, starring James Stewart, Frank Lovejoy, Barry Sullivan, Alex Nicol and June Allyson(n)

programme.title: The Day Will Dawn (1942)

He enlists the help of a local sea captain's daughter, but the plan goes wrong and he ends up in enemy hands, facing death by firing squad. Second World War adventure, with Hugh Williams, Deborah Kerr and Ralph Richardson(n)

programme.desc: A teenager falls in love with a new girl in his school, only to discover she is a witch. Fantasy based on Kami Garcia's novel, starring Alden Ehrenreich, Alice Englert, Jeremy Irons and Emma Thompson(n)

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hoards of the alien creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard go camping to watch the Leonid meteor shower, but the trip takes an unexpected turn thanks to some specially baked cookies. Meanwhile, Penny injures herself in the shower, and with the rest of the gang out of town, it's left to Sheldon to come to her aid(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: A selection of memorable moments from the most recent series, including the armchair critics' opinions on Ant & Dec's Saturday Night Takeaway, One Born Every Minute, The Wine Show, Made in Yorkshire, The Andrew Marr Show, Martin Lewis taking on Facebook on This Morning, Jose Mourinho on Match of the Day and Arsene Wenger on the News(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick is furious to discover that a secret toilet facility in an idyllic dimension that he built for his own exclusive use has been invaded by an alien and he sets out to track down the culprit. Jerry gets involved in the development of a new dating app that causes widespread chaos(n)

programme.title: Mr Pickles
programme.desc: When Tommy hunts for the missing Father's Day pie, he encounters Bigfoot who is actually a man in the witness protection programme(n)

programme.title: Robot Chicken
programme.desc: The crew reveal the events that made Harold start drawing with his purple crayon and Jerry Seinfeld and The Joker have an explosive chat in Jerry's car(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Lea and Tony Desborough from Essex have fallen in love with Menorca on countless holidays over the last 20 years, and have dreamed of owning their own place there. Now, as they wind down their work commitments, they've decided it's time to make that dream a reality. Laura Hamilton shows them five costal villas for their £250,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Phil and Caroline Mansell from Wales have been holidaying together in the La Marina Alta region of Spain's Costa Blanca for years. Phil, who suffers from severe arthritis, finds the climate helps his symptoms so they are selling their home back in the UK and are planning a full-time move. Ben Hillman shows them five properties for their £100,000 budget, but will any of them be their dream home?(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host as the remaining bakers' knowledge of pastry is tested. The Signature challenge is a savoury take on a French classic, there's a multi-layered Moroccan Technical, and a towering Showstopper that requires not only an expertise with pastry, but also a solid grasp of structural engineering. With a place in the semi-final at stake, who will win the coveted Star Baker title from judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood?(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien discover items in Wensleydale, North Yorkshire, that are ready for upcycling to turn a profit for their owners(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien assess sewing machines in Kent as they continue their journey across the UK to find unique and valuable items 'lost' in people's homes(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Callum Hogg and Lauren Abraham's modern Park Hotel in Gloucestershire, where sisters Sue Lewis and Wendy Germann are impressed by the colourful decor, but it's not an opinion held by all. The guests are not impressed with having to pay extra for breakfast and Callum and Lauren are faced with robust feedback that leaves them wanting answers and thinking not everyone is being fair(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Trowbridge in Wiltshire to Sue's B&B, which is run by Sue Lewis and her sister, Wendy Germann. Breakfast at the communal table has its awkward moments and Sue is under pressure, having never cooked for so many before. However, it's the feedback that leaves the hosts wondering if maybe some of the guests have not been that straightforward(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to The Talbot in Iwerne Minster, Dorset for the third day of the competition, where hosts Erika Watt and Ellie Gill greet their guests. The rooms do not live up to their good first impression and Callum and Lauren are quick to find fault. At breakfast, tensions simmer as Wendy calls Cameron a creep, and at feedback, some of the comments send Erika and Ellie into fits of giggles(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The fourth visit of the week is to The Old Rectory in Llangattock, south Wales, where young hotel manager Cameron Thomas likes to keep things professional. Despite wanting to find fault, Lauren and Callum are soon to admit their bridal suite is top notch, but Erika and Ellie think there may be some cleaning issues. During an afternoon of canoe racing the group members show their competitive sides(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guest house owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores. The Park Hotel in Gloucestershire is up first as owners Callum Hogg and Lauren Abraham want to get to the bottom of why Cameron didn't sleep soundly. Next, Sue Lewis from Sue's B&B seeks to discover the deasons for Callum and Lauren's low score for the cleanliness. When all issues are resolved, the winning establishment is revealed(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary capturing the behaviour of the animals at Chester Zoo. Kendari the babirusa - a bizarre-looking creature also known as a deer-pig - is trying to give birth, but is being disturbed by a couple of mischievous otters. Young male orang-utan Willie struggles to impress the females, while Raz the aye-aye, a rare nocturnal primate related to lemurs, is being encouraged to share his home with two jumping rats(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Olliers from Stenhousemuir in Scotland, where husband and wife Steven and Mhairi are undecided whether to sell their home or renovate it. Kirstie produces a plan that revolutionises the whole house, while Phil is tasked to find them a home that's a short throw away from their beloved cricket club(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend lead a team of experts as they attempt to renovate a US army Jeep that survived the Second World War but was later damaged in an arson attack. They hope a rapid turnaround on the vehicle will dazzle and surprise its current owner, Dick Masters(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: It's springtime at the chateau, and with the wedding season just a few weeks away, completing phase two of the basement project is becoming an urgent priority for Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree. To cater for all their summer guests, a much-needed utility and laundry room is about to be plumbed in. Angel comes up with a unique way of preserving the 150-year-old wallpaper, while Dick wrestles with a rake while working on the meadow(n)

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The eleven remaining potters are tasked with hand-building an elaborate chess set and throwing miniature vases at the wheel. Hosted by Melanie Sykes(n)

programme.title: My Grandparents' War
programme.desc: Actor and peace campaigner Mark Rylance finds out what happened to his grandfather Osmond Skinner during the Second World War, a man who spent almost four years as a Japanese prisoner of war. Mark uncovers how his grandfather bravely joined the Hong Kong Volunteer Defence Force with no military training, before being shot on Christmas Day and taken as a prisoner of war. Throughout the programme, Rylance find his views on war tested as he uncovers the real and shocking truth about his grandfather's wartime experience(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Maureen, who's 66, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe through her tracheostomy. Nurse Christine battles to clear her airway, while Maureen's husband Preston waits in the relatives' room. As doctors carry out further investigations, Preston joins Maureen and it's revealed how their world was turned upside down when Maureen was diagnosed with the neurological condition multiple system atrophy. Ten-year-old Ryan is brought into resus having fallen at school and suffered internal bleeding(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the hybrid panel quiz show, putting a comedy spin on Channel 4's long-running words-and-numbers game. Guest team captain David Walliams joins forces with Jonathan Ross, while Jon Richardson teams up with Joe Lycett. Isy Suttie joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley takes care of the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The eleven remaining potters are tasked with hand-building an elaborate chess set and throwing miniature vases at the wheel. Hosted by Melanie Sykes(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Maureen, who's 66, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe through her tracheostomy. Nurse Christine battles to clear her airway, while Maureen's husband Preston waits in the relatives' room. As doctors carry out further investigations, Preston joins Maureen and it's revealed how their world was turned upside down when Maureen was diagnosed with the neurological condition multiple system atrophy. Ten-year-old Ryan is brought into resus having fallen at school and suffered internal bleeding(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates the catastrophic effects of not getting enough vitamin D, meeting a young boy suffering from rickets and discovering the surprising origin of the fortified vitamin D that's added to many supermarket foods. Kate Quilton explores how supermarkets are able to sell normally expensive wagyu beef at knockdown prices, while Matt Tebbutt heads to Switzerland to ask why there are holes in Swiss cheese(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Creative Brighton couple Emily and Peter Harold have been holidaying on the Spanish island of Mallorca for 14 years, and are determined to buy a second home there. They're looking for somewhere to relax and soak up the sun and culture on offer in their favourite spot of Port de Soller. Laura Hamilton shows them five apartments for their £250,000 budge(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Denise Greenacre has retired and is determined to buy a home in Spain. Ben Hillman shows Denise and her daughter Rebecca five properties around Torrevieja on the Costa Blanca for her £80,000 budget(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig present the semi-final of the baking contest, which tests the four remaining bakers' skills with patisserie. There are only three places in next week's final, and this round of challenges will determine who does not make the cut. The signature dish requires a delicate dome and a perfect finish, while for the technical, the bakers must take croquembouche to the next level. Finally, for the showstopper, they must use all their skills to construct an edible display case(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole tries to restore a monkey bike, and Simon O'Brien makes use of all his skills as he tries to give new life to an old racing bicycle(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien finds a barn containing a collection of replica Rolls-Royce cars, and Henry Cole tries his hand at driving a tractor as they continue their money-making tour(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Shiralee Bed & Breakfast in Salisbury, run by Fay Lahiani and her partner Ray Cooper, where some guests are shocked by the colourful and cluttered decor, while the presence of CCTV cameras also causes concern(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At The Bluebell Woods in Northampton, David and Donna Bletsoe Brown try to bring a touch of class to their woodland B&B, but Fay Lahiani and Ray Cooper are on the warpath and are quick to discover a mucky mattress. Meanwhile, Marc Harris and Wayne Williams reveal their competitive streak during an afternoon of horse riding(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to The Lion Hotel in Pontypool for the third day of the contest, where manager Marc Harris and head chef Wayne Williams aim to deliver a high end service. Although some of the guests are impressed by the rooms, Ray and Fay find it too small for the price, and simmering tensions between some of the competitors leads to a clash over dinner. At breakfast, Wayne's food comes under fire, but it is David and Donna's feedback about finding a nail in their room that really rattles their hosts(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final guest house of the week is the New Inn, Talgarth, where ex-naval officer Damon Lewis is the sole captain of his ship. Wayne and Marc are determined to be brutally honest, and Donna and David are forced to work closely with their rivals Fay and Ray during an afternoon team-building exercise. Over dinner, Damon admits that taking on the B&B, pub and restaurant all by himself may have not been the best decision - as proved when he has trouble running a solo breakfast service(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time, with Fay and Ray from Shiralee B&B wanting to find out why David and Donna were so critical of their cleanliness. The group members continue to air their grievances as they find out what they've been paid, before the winner is revealed(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary capturing the behaviour of the animals at Chester Zoo. An outbreak of disease in the penguin colony leaves chick Munch fighting for his life. Sulawesi macaque Lisa gives birth and dad Mamassa is providing pretty useless, so older brother Beaker steps in to help with the babysitting. Andean spectacled bear Bernie is determined to woo Lima when she enters her short window of fertility, and young male tortoise Football muscles in on 71-year-old Bert's harem of females(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Tuck family in Long Eaton, Derbyshire, who have grown weary of their cramped, three bedroom semi-detached home. Kirstie offers her thoughts on ways the family could change the downstairs of the property, while Phil sets out to find a suitable house they could buy instead(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw lead a team of experts who secretly restore classic cars for their unsuspecting owners. They continue by helping widower Jeremy, who was unable to work after a car accident, by giving his Fiat Spider the makeover it deserves(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: The start of the wedding season sees Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree at their busiest, with events booked all through the summer, but there is still time to make improvements. Angel has her sights set on transforming the gravelled area at the front of the chateau into a thing of beauty and the whole family take a trip to Monet's stunning house and garden, where a plan for the chateau's very own water lily patch is hatched(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets entrepreneur Paul Wilkinson and his wife Amy, who are building a giant new home on a 16-acre plot in Lincolnshire. The superstructure will be comprised of five circular buildings made up of interlocking timber cylinders, linked by raised wooden walkways that hang over a fishing lake. The complicated build proves difficult for Paul's local team, and their ambitious schedule of completing the project in a year soon looks out of reach(n)

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Max and his staff struggle to keep the patients safe with few resources during a snowstorm, even if it means taking to the streets of the city and braving the blizzard(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The devastating effects that so-called legal highs can have on users in one community and the huge strain their use is putting on already stretched emergency services. In Warrington, PC Karl Dickin is one of eight officers sent to detain a man in his 20s who's taken a cocktail of illegal and legal drugs and is acting erratically, while a regular user is found coughing up blood at a bus stop(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words and numbers quiz, with Lee Mack and Catherine Tate taking on Sean Lock and Miles Jupp. John Cooper Clarke joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarella's in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leone's in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant(n)

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Max and his staff struggle to keep the patients safe with few resources during a snowstorm, even if it means taking to the streets of the city and braving the blizzard(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Spain to meet an entrepreneur who is investing a large amount of money in an attempt to farm the critically endangered Atlantic bluefin tuna. With just one of these fish selling for a record £1million at auction in Tokyo, the rewards could be huge. Kate Quilton investigates why ice cream in freezers can sometimes get gritty ahead of the best before date, while Matt Tebbutt tries to find out what the difference is between the supermarkets' premium and budget range of frozen peas(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Elaine and Nicos Nicolaou seek to return to their Greek roots by buying a property in Kefalonia, and Jasmine Harman seeks out five properties in the island's southern region that fall within the couple's £60,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ex-RAF officers Simon Stenning and Amanda Butcher have been visiting the Caribbean island of Antigua for several years, and now hope to find the perfect winter home there. Ben Hillman helps the pair, showing them five properties for their £330,000 budget(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host the final of the culinary competition. As family and friends gather on the lawn outside, the last three bakers enter the tent to prepare a chocolate cake as their signature bake. For the technical challenge, they must master that most delicate of dishes, the souffle, and finally for their showstopper, they must create an edible illusion using only cake, sweet bread and biscuits(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien arrive in York, where Henry struggles to squeeze into some motorcycle leathers and Simon gets into deep water when he tries to restore an aluminium boat(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a stately home in Somerset, where Simon is convinced he has uncovered a genuine Tudor relic(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Alston House in Cumbria, where owners Michael and Carole Allchorne are brimming with confidence, but Yvonne Copeland and Gail Wells are less than impressed with the decor. The guests are impressed with chef Michael's breakfast, but the hosts are left reeling by the criticisms levelled at their hotel during the feedback session(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Scotia House in Harrogate, where host Marie Lock is hoping her obsessive cleaning regime will give her the edge in the competition. In the rooms, both Michael and Carole and Yvonne and Gail find the deluxe teddy bears freaky, and for Billy and Billy, things are a little on the cosy side. In the afternoon, Marie's keen to show off her moves and pits her guests against each other in a Northern Soul dance off(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Canberra Guest House in Blackpool for the third day of the competition, where host Yvonne Copeland, joined by her part-time helper Gail Wells, hopes her cheap and cheerful B&B will win over her guests. However, Marie finds what she thinks is urine and hair on the toilet seat in her room, and a lack of wi-fi means Billy Junior has to put his business on hold. Yvonne takes her competitors to a local reptile house, but serious divisions unfold within the group, and later, tensions rise again at dinner(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Crown and Kitchen in East Linton, East Lothian, owned by father and son Billy and Billy Jr Robertson, who see themselves as the jokers of the pack. Yvonne and Gail leave no mattress unturned in their room inspection, although Michael and Carole are impressed. Later, Yvonne makes quite a splash when the hosts organise an assault course for their guests, but slow service during breakfast leaves the B&Bers disappointed - especially when Billy Jr is at a loss to explain what the problem was(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores. Things are tense from the start as Carole and Michael from Alston House challenge Marie on her comments. Next, Marie from Scotia House wants to set the record straight with allegations of tit-for-tat scoring. The group members proceed to thrash out their differences before the week's winners are revealed(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Sumatran tiger Kirana faces losing its two cubs, who are fully grown and being moved to other zoos to start families of their own. Indonesian dwarf buffalo Oana, one of Chester's most sensitive animals, gives birth - only for the new mum's anxiety to threaten the calf's health(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help the Clayton-Fishers, who have fallen out of love with their home in Walthamstow, east London. Sarah and her wife Pepper have opposing views on what to do with their two-bedroom terrace, as Sarah thinks it is time to move on, but Pepper is digging her heels in and wants to convert the loft(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw lead a team of experts who secretly restore classic cars for their unsuspecting owners. They continue by helping James Hutchings-Clarke, whose entire family drive Ford Anglias, but whose own vehicle does not even have an engine(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel are warming up for one of the year's biggest events - Angel's parents' 50th wedding anniversary, which involves inviting more than 100 people to a huge party. There's a bespoke menu to plan and prepare, so Dick has called in the cavalry, with his son James arriving from Cornwall. Together with some help from Arthur, the Strawbridge boys have their work cut out as they create dishes they hope will strike a chord with everyone(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Mark, a 35-year-old long-term resident at a neurological hospital, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe, and his devoted parents are with him as doctors attempt to get to the bottom of his symptoms. Three-year-old Thomas is brought in with a high temperature by his parents, who are concerned as he was born with an extremely rare blood condition that meant he needed a full blood exchange when he was less than 24 hours old(n)

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: When the naked body of a man wearing a bull's head is discovered at the Gare de Bordeaux-St-Jean, Captain Anais Chatelet is the first detective on the scene. That evening, an amnesiac is found wandering along the road carrying a car wrench covered in blood. He is taken to a nearby psychiatric institution and placed under the care of psychiatrist Mathias Freire. Before long, Anais's investigations into the murder introduce her to the Greek myth of the Minotaur and she becomes increasingly suspicious of Mathias. With Jean-Hugues Anglade, Raphaelle Agogue, Michael Cohen, Hocine Choutri, Didier Flamand and Mathieu Simonet. In French with English subtitles(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Exploring the hopes and expectations of three different men and how they respond to changes that are beyond their control. They include Stanlie, 24, who is airlifted to St George's by helicopter paramedics after being impaled on a metal rod at a construction site(n)

programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May compete in a 1950s-style race from London to Edinburgh. programme.desc: Tony Robinson takes a four-day trek along the coastline between Plymouth in Devon and Falmouth, learning about the thriving smuggling trade in Cornwall during the late 18th century. The area's tiny secretive harbours, beaches and secluded coves were ideal for illicit imports such as tobacco and brandy, and the business was so huge it threatened the national economy. Along his route, visiting such beauty spots as Lantic Bay and Polperro, he encounters all sorts of reminders of the trade and meets descendants of those involved(n)

They found that Ben Field, a would-be vicar and academic, had recently become part of both the men's lives and benefited from their wills. programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Danny is in for a surprise when his mum drops by with some news - she's divorcing his father. McGarrett is on hand to protect Grover when a reporter starts asking questions about Chicago, and Chin and Kono try to solve the murder of an estate agent found dead in one of his properties. Melanie Griffith (Working Girl) and Daryl Hannah (Kill Bill) guest star(n)

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: Sherlock delves into the dark side of the ballet industry to investigate the murder of an up-and-coming dancer. Meanwhile, a regular at the homeless shelter where Joan volunteers has been hospitalised after a psychotic episode, and claims to have information about a kidnapping. However, the police dismiss his ramblings as nonsense. With Aleksa Palladino (Boardwalk Empire) and Scott Cohen (Necessary Roughness)(n)

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sgt Basilone arrives in Guadalcanal, and quickly earns the respect of his comrades for his leadership and valour in a series of skirmishes. However, a naval bombardment leads to several casualties - and when it is followed by a major assault on the airfield, Basilone and his men are pushed to the limits of their endurance as they try to defend their territory. Second World War drama, starring Jon Seda(n)

programme.title: How I Caught the Killer

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: Dramatic reconstruction of the story of Major Phil Ashby of the Royal Marines, who was attacked by child soldiers during a UN peacekeeping mission to disarm warring factions in Sierra Leone, West Africa. Surrounded, outgunned and outnumbered, he risked everything in a desperate bid to escape through 50 miles of rebel-controlled jungle in 2000(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)
